narrative.headline: Minervini AI system v1 in cold start phase with insufficient data for pattern recognition across all metrics.
narrative.setup_narrative: No established setups have generated statistically significant sample sizes yet; system requires minimum trade volume to identify high-probability VCP, flat base, or momentum continuation patterns.
narrative.regime_narrative: Single UNKNOWN regime trade (0% win rate) indicates market classification engine has not calibrated; system needs exposure across volatile, trending, and consolidating conditions to build regime detection models.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests either overly permissive entry criteria or absence of scanning activity; no opportunity cost data available for filter optimization.
narrative.recommendation: Deploy paper trading mode across multiple market regimes for 20-30 trades minimum to establish baseline performance metrics and enable adaptive weight calibration.

narrative.headline: System initialization phase with insufficient data - only 2 trades executed under unknown regime conditions with 0% win rate.
narrative.setup_narrative: No performing setups have been identified yet; system requires minimum trade sample size to establish statistical significance and identify edge conditions.
narrative.regime_narrative: Regime detection is non-functional with all trades classified as UNKNOWN, indicating either market condition ambiguity or incomplete technical indicator calculation during the measurement period.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests overly permissive entry criteria or lack of opportunity flow; unable to assess filter effectiveness without baseline activity.
narrative.recommendation: Extend observation period to accumulate minimum 20-30 trades across identifiable regime conditions before drawing performance conclusions or adjusting adaptive weights.

narrative.headline: System in bootstrap phase with insufficient data for meaningful performance assessment across 3 trades in undefined market regime.
narrative.setup_narrative: No established setup patterns yet identified; system requires minimum sample size to validate edge across Minervini criteria including stage analysis, relative strength, and volume characteristics.
narrative.regime_narrative: All trades classified as UNKNOWN regime with 0% win rate indicates either regime detection failure or legitimately choppy market conditions preventing clear bull/bear/consolidation classification.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests overly permissive entry criteria or lack of active filtration mechanisms; no opportunity cost analysis available.
narrative.recommendation: Accumulate minimum 20-30 trades before drawing conclusions while verifying regime classification logic is properly categorizing market conditions using volatility and trend strength metrics.

narrative.headline: Minervini AI system in initial data collection phase with insufficient trade history for statistical analysis across all measured dimensions.
narrative.setup_narrative: No setup patterns have generated statistically significant performance data yet; system requires minimum trade threshold before identifying edge in breakout, pullback, or continuation configurations.
narrative.regime_narrative: All four trades classified as UNKNOWN regime with 0% win rate indicates either adverse market conditions during sample period or setup criteria misalignment; insufficient data prevents meaningful regime detection or adaptation.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests conservative entry criteria are not causing opportunity loss; underperformance stems from executed trade quality rather than selection overfitting.
narrative.recommendation: Continue live data collection through 20-30 additional trades before enabling adaptive weight modifications; current sample size creates overfitting risk and prevents statistically valid regime classification.

narrative.headline: System in cold-start phase with minimal data: 5 trades executed under UNKNOWN regime conditions showing 0% win rate on adaptive weights version 1.
narrative.setup_narrative: No setup patterns have emerged yet with insufficient trade sample size to identify statistically significant edge or performance differentiation across strategies.
narrative.regime_narrative: All 5 trades occurred during UNKNOWN market regime with 0% win rate, indicating either regime classification failure or need for regime detection calibration before pattern recognition becomes viable.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests overly permissive entry criteria or lack of active filtering mechanisms, missing no opportunities but potentially accepting low-probability setups.
narrative.recommendation: Accumulate minimum 30-50 trades before drawing conclusions; immediately implement regime classification logic to categorize market conditions (trending/ranging/volatile) and enable meaningful performance attribution.

narrative.headline: System in cold-start phase with minimal data capture across 6 trades, all classified as UNKNOWN regime with zero wins recorded.
narrative.setup_narrative: No performing setups identified yet; insufficient trade sample size to establish statistical significance or pattern recognition across Minervini-style VCP, flat base, or momentum structures.
narrative.regime_narrative: All 6 trades occurred during UNKNOWN regime conditions with 0% win rate, indicating either improper regime classification, adverse market conditions during initial deployment, or setup calibration issues preventing edge capture.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests overly permissive entry criteria or lack of active opportunity scanning; no evidence of system protecting capital by avoiding marginal setups.
narrative.recommendation: Immediately verify regime detection logic is functioning correctly and increase sample size to minimum 20-30 trades before drawing statistical conclusions; consider tightening entry filters to establish baseline setup quality.

narrative.headline: System in cold-start initialization phase with insufficient data for adaptive learning across 7 early-stage trades.
narrative.setup_narrative: No statistically significant setup patterns have emerged yet; all trades currently classified under baseline parameters without performance differentiation.
narrative.regime_narrative: Market regime detection non-functional with 100% UNKNOWN classification and 0% win rate indicating either inadequate volatility/trend signals or premature evaluation period.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades suggests overly permissive entry criteria currently active, potentially allowing low-quality setups through without proper regime confirmation.
narrative.recommendation: Require minimum 20-trade sample size before adaptive weight adjustments and implement regime classification validation using VIX/trend metrics to exit UNKNOWN state.

narrative.headline: System operating with critically low sample size across bearish setups, showing 50% win rate on momentum reversals but unreliable signal quality in undefined regime conditions.
narrative.setup_narrative: MOMENTUM_BURST_DOWN demonstrates 50% success across 6 trades suggesting viable mean-reversion potential, while ORB_BREAKDOWN shows complete failure across 10 trades indicating breakdown trades are mispriced or hitting in adverse conditions.
narrative.regime_narrative: UNKNOWN regime classification with 0% win rate across 8 trades signals critical failure in market state detection—system is trading blind without proper volatility, trend, or structure context.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades indicates overly permissive entry criteria rather than disciplined selectivity, suggesting quality control mechanisms are not functioning.
narrative.recommendation: Immediately implement regime classification logic (trend/volatility filters) and pause ORB_BREAKDOWN entries until minimum 15-trade sample confirms edge exists under defined market conditions.

narrative.headline: Adaptive learning system shows critical early-stage instability with only 16 total trades across 2 adaptations, revealing insufficient data for reliable pattern recognition.
narrative.setup_narrative: MOMENTUM_BURST_DOWN demonstrates 50% win rate across 6 trades, suggesting potential downside momentum capture capability, while ORB_BREAKDOWN shows complete failure at 0% across 10 trades, indicating either poor breakout confirmation logic or adverse market conditions for gap-down scenarios.
narrative.regime_narrative: All 9 regime-classified trades occurred under UNKNOWN conditions with 0% win rate, signaling the regime detection module is either non-functional or market conditions fall outside trained parameters, creating blind trading without contextual awareness.
narrative.missed_narrative: Zero filtered trades indicates the system is not defensive enough, allowing all signals through without quality filters during what appears to be a challenging trading environment based on overall poor performance metrics.
narrative.recommendation: Immediately implement regime classification diagnostics to resolve UNKNOWN status, increase minimum sample size requirements to 25+ trades per setup before adaptation, and add volatility-based filters to ORB_BREAKDOWN to prevent low-probability entries.
